prompt: Generate pytest cases for idempotency-key duplicate payment behavior, including same payload, conflicting payload, and concurrent requests.
Generate regression tests proving refunded invoice line items are not counted in total_due while partial refunds still count the remainder.
Generate a concurrency test proving semaphore permits are released when async jobs are cancelled before completion.
Generate tests for SQLite usage-ledger writes that close connections on Windows and avoid database-is-locked failures.
Generate tests for benchmark report generation that verify both benchmark-report.json and benchmark-report.md are reproducible from the same run.
Generate tests for route explanations showing a rejected candidate because it is higher cost with similar success rate.
Generate migration tests for backfilling nullable account_id in batches before enforcing a NOT NULL constraint.
Generate tests for parsing stack traces into structured frames while preserving original diagnostic text.
Generate route-history tests for weekly buckets with fixed timestamps, timezone boundaries, and selected-model percentages.
Generate tests proving provider-reported cost_usd overrides configured token estimates without marking actual usage as estimated.
